ScriptLines.ScriptLine: if not String.IsNullOrEmpty(itemStarting) and not String.IsNullOrEmpty(locStarting) then
"' and Loc >= '" + locStarting + "' and Loc <= '" + locEnding + "'"
Private Function isFormMiningEnabled(subprocessCode as String, activityCode as String, activityName as String) As String
Dim Load As LoadCollectionRequestData = New LoadCollectionRequestData()
Load.Filter = string.format("SubprocessCode='{0}' and ActivityCode='{1}' and ActivityName='{2}'", subprocessCode, activityCode, activityName)
Application.DiagnosticsLog(Load.Filter & " filter returned " + response.Items.Count.ToString() & " rows in getAttributes")
